forecasts.rationale: Extreme Fear at 11/100 (down 12 from prior) signals sharp sentiment deterioration and historically elevated short-term downside risk, warranting modest negative drift adjustments and vol band widening across all horizons; funding rates remain modestly positive (longs paying shorts) indicating residual crowded-long positioning that could accelerate liquidation cascades on further weakness, adding a small negative skew; however, extreme fear readings can also mark capitulation bottoms, limiting the magnitude of directional adjustments and keeping p_up_override null — uncertainty is expressed primarily through wider bands rather than a strong directional call.
